titleStmt.title: SII 22.440: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 440. (A.R. No. 440 of 1906) COIMBATORE DISTRICT, GOPICHETTIPALAIYAM TALUK, DAṆĀYAKAṈKŌṬṬAI. RUINED ŚIVA TEMPLE IN THE FORT—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA

summary.p: This is dated in the cyclic year Sarvajit which would correspond to Śaka 1269, on which date Mahāpradhāni Immaḍi Rāhuttarāya Siṅgaiya-Daṇṇāyakar is stated to have granted to the temple of Tāntōṉṟīśvaramuḍaiya-Nāyanār at Nīlagiri-Sadhāraṇaṉkōṭṭai, the tax taṟiiṟai on the looms due from the weavers residing in the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam streets round the temple and the duty on cloth (ilāñjinaippēṟ) sold in shops. He also presented to the temple a coracle or ferry boat (for plying passengers across the river) on the southern bank.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrīmaṉu mahāpradāṉi Immaṭi Irākuttarāyaṉ ciṅkaiya teṇṇāyakkar nilakiri
cātāraṇaṉ koṭṭaiyil Uṭaiyār tāntoṉṟiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉa
ttārkku nam Olai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Innāyaṉār tirumaṭaiviḷākattu Irukkum neyyum kaikkoḷar
Uḷḷavarkaḷukku taṟiiṟaiāyamum kaṭaiyil viṟkum puṭavaikku Ilāñciṉai Uḷḷa mutalum Iṉṉāyaṉā
rkku sarvajitsamvaṟcarattu paṅkūṉi mātamutal sarvamāṉiyamāka kuṭut tom Ippaṭikku Inta Olai cātaṉamā
kak koṇṭu kallilum cempilum veṭṭuvittu candrādityavaraiyum naṭattik koḷḷavum Ikkoyi
ttut teṟkiṟ tuṟaiyile Oru paṟacilum Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku sarvamānnyamākak kuṭuttom (ṣome Kannada letters Are not printed) .
Digital edition of SII 22.440 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
